title: Bill Rapp
compiled_truth: Bill Rapp is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-08 to 2002-03-25), Bill Rapp sent 148 and received 375 emails, totalling 523 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (49), [Teb Lokey](people/teb-lokey) (33), [Robert Kilmer](people/robert-kilmer) (32), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (27), [Kay Miller](people/kay-miller) (22). Mailbox folders observed: _sent, deleted_items, e_mail_bin, hr_info, inbox, misc_tw.
